item.title: Cleveland Pipe Alert: Extreme Temp Swings!
item.description: Cleveland is facing wild temperature swings, putting your home's plumbing at serious risk. Learn essential tips to prevent burst pipes and costly damage this winter. Get vital pipe protection tips now. Watch page: https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/live-video/cleveland-pipe-alert-extreme-temp-swings.html

item.title: Cleveland Pipe Alert: Rain to Ice Threat!
item.description: Recent heavy rains followed by freezing temperatures create a perfect storm for burst pipes in Cleveland homes. Learn crucial steps now to protect your plumbing and avoid costly damage this winter. Watch our video for immediate pipe protection strategies. Watch page: https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/live-video/cleveland-pipe-alert-rain-to-ice-threat.html

item.title: Cleveland Homeowners: Stop Spring Thaw Burst Pipes!
item.description: As Cleveland warms up, thawing ground can put immense pressure on your home's pipes. Learn crucial steps to prevent costly burst pipes and protect your property this spring. Watch our video for vital prevention tips. Watch page: https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/live-video/cleveland-homeowners-stop-spring-thaw-burst-pipes.html
